'''Maer''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] who served as a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He<ref name="JKTCG" /> was stationed at<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|274|Maer, Corporal}}</ref> the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] headquarters<ref name="Echo Base CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|225|Echo Base}}</ref> of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] shortly before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> Maer was a [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntaun]] handler who developed a unique [[Sign language/Legends|sign language]] to communicate with the [[Species/Legends|creatures]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He received training in the use of many of Echo Base's heavy weapons, including the [[Atgar SpaceDefense Corporation/Legends|Atgar]] [[1.4 FD P-Tower/Legends|1.4 FD P-Tower]].<ref name="JKTCG2">{{JKTCG|set=Masters of the Force|cardname=Corporal Maer • Quick Draw|link=http://www.decipher.com/jediknights/cardlists/mastersoftheforce/large/4corporalmaerquickdraw.html}}</ref> Following the Rebel Alliance's defeat at Hoth, Maer became well-known as one of Echo Base's tauntaun handlers.<ref name="Hoth: Under the Ice">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031211hoth2|series=Hoth: Under the Ice|text=Part 2: Steady, Girl}}</ref>

Maer was an expert on animals<ref name="CSWE" /> as well as Hoth's frozen terrain. During his tenure on Hoth, Maer wore the Rebellion's standard Echo Base [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|cold-weather armor]]. His [[Armor/Legends|suit]] included [[Alliance Cold Weather Headgear|headgear]], [[Anti-glare goggles/Legends|anti-glare goggles]], a [[Scarf/Legends|scarf]], padded [[Clothing/Legends|vest]], padded tunic, gloves, and leggings.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Maer was first mentioned on a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] edition of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
